positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos_problem
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u23,axiom,
    ~baby_multiple_birth(luke)).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    ~lives_with_strangers(luke)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define lives_at_home(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define hangs_out_plays(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define multiple_birth_siblings(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define siblings_born_together(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define complains_annoying(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg_problem
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u28,axiom,
    ~baby_multiple_birth(luke)).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    ~lives_with_strangers(luke)).

cnf(u35,negated_conjecture,
    siblings_born_together(luke)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~multiple_birth_siblings(X0) | hangs_out_plays(X0)).

cnf(u24,negated_conjecture,
    complains_annoying(luke)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~complains_annoying(X0) | siblings_born_together(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~siblings_born_together(X0) | multiple_birth_siblings(X0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~hangs_out_plays(X0) | lives_at_home(X0)).

cnf(u37,negated_conjecture,
    hangs_out_plays(luke)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~lives_with_strangers(X0) | ~lives_at_home(X0)).

cnf(u36,negated_conjecture,
    multiple_birth_siblings(luke)).

cnf(u38,negated_conjecture,
    lives_at_home(luke)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
